headline: PPL (PPL) Leans On Cost Discipline, Is The Stock Still Undervalued?
summary: PPL (PPL) is drawing investor attention after emphasizing disciplined cost management that lowers operating and maintenance expenses while supporting a planned US$23b investment program running through 2029 and underpinning the utility’s stated earnings guidance. See our latest analysis for PPL. Recent trading has been softer, with the share price down 1.2% over the last day and 7.3% over 90 days. However, PPL’s 3 year total shareholder return of 41.0% and 5 year total shareholder return of...
